import { namedTypes } from "ast-types"; import { Lines } from "./lines"; type Pos = namedTypes.Position; type Loc = namedTypes.SourceLocation; export default class Mapping { sourceLines: Lines; sourceLoc: Loc; targetLoc: Loc; constructor(sourceLines: Lines, sourceLoc: Loc, targetLoc?: Loc); slice(lines: Lines, start: Pos, end?: Pos): Mapping | null; add(line: number, column: number): Mapping; subtract(line: number, column: number): Mapping; indent(by: number, skipFirstLine?: boolean, noNegativeColumns?: boolean): Mapping; } export {};
